Class BattleScene

java.lang.Object
gui.BattleScene
public class BattleScene extends Object
The BattleScene class is responsible for rendering and controlling the graphical user interface of the battle phase in the game.

This class connects the BattleEngine and BattleModel with the JavaFX UI layer. It handles:

  • Displaying heroes and monsters
  • Rendering HP bars with animations
  • Managing skill selection and descriptions
  • Handling turn transitions
  • Playing attack and hit animations
  • Updating UI when the model changes

The class uses static UI references to maintain a single active battle scene during runtime.

Architecture Role:

  • View layer in MVC structure
  • Listens to BattleListener callbacks
  • Updates UI based on BattleStage

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Represents a visual HP bar component for a unit.
    private static class 
    BattleScene.SkillInfo
    Holds display name and description for each action type for a single hero.

    Glow effect for hovered selectable cards during target selection.

    The active hero at the previous stage.

    Previous stage used to detect stage transitions and play end-turn animations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
    buildHeroElementOverlay(Heroes hero)
    Creates a top-left overlay icon for a hero showing: element icon and hero icon.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
    buildMonsterElementOverlay(Monster m)
    Creates a top-right overlay icon for a monster showing: element icon and monster sprite icon.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
    buildSkillDescriptionPanel()
    Builds the bottom-right description panel that shows action name and description based on the currently active hero and the selected skill type.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
    buildSkillPanel()
    Builds the bottom-left skill button panel containing: normal, skill, ultimate, and cancel buttons.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
    buildStageCounterPanel(GameEngine gameEngine)
    Builds a top-center panel that displays the stage counter.
    private static void
    buildUnits()
    Builds all unit cards for heroes and monsters one time.
    private static void
    clearSkillButtonEffects()
    Clears glow effects from skill buttons.
    private static javafx.scene.control.Button
    createImageButton(String path, double fitW, double fitH)
    Creates an image-based JavaFX button with hover and press animations.
    private static GameEngine
    getGameEngine()
    Returns the current game engine reference for this battle scene.
    private static javafx.stage.Stage
    getStage()
    Returns the current stage reference for this battle scene.
    private static void
    handleEndTurnAttackImage(BattleStage currentStage)
    Handles attack image transitions when a turn ends.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    heroAttackImg(Heroes h)
    Returns the attack sprite image for a hero.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    heroBaseImg(Heroes h)
    Returns the base hero image appropriate for current hero state: dead, shielded, or idle.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    heroDeadImg(Heroes h)
    Returns the dead sprite image for a hero.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    heroIdleImg(Heroes h)
    Returns the idle sprite image for a hero.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    heroShieldImg(Heroes h)
    Returns the shield sprite image for a hero.
    private static void
    initHeroSkillsOnce()
    Initializes the hero skill description map if it has not been initialized yet.
    private static void
    initTopCornerElementUI(javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane root)
    Initializes the top-corner element UI panels and places them in the root anchor pane.
    private static boolean
    isHeroDecisionStage(BattleStage s)
    Returns true if the stage is a hero decision stage where player input is expected.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    loadImageSafe(String path, String fallbackPath)
    Attempts to load an image from a resource path.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    monsterAttackImg(Monster m)
    Returns the attack sprite image for a monster.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    monsterBaseImg(Monster m)
    Returns the base monster image appropriate for current monster state: dead or idle.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    monsterDeadImg(Monster m)
    Returns the dead sprite image for a monster.
    private static javafx.scene.image.Image
    monsterIdleImg(Monster m)
    Returns the idle sprite image for a monster.
    private static String
    monsterTypeName(Monster m)
    Returns the resolved monster type folder name for a monster.
    private static void
    onHeroTurnStartedForHud(Heroes hero)
    Called when a hero turn starts to update HUD state and default description selection.
    private static void
    playAllMonstersAttack(List<Monster> monsters, int idx, Runnable onAllDone, Consumer<Monster> applyDamageForMonster)
    Plays attack animations for all monsters sequentially.
    private static void
    playHitAnimation(javafx.scene.layout.Region card)
    Plays a short hit animation (shake) on a unit card.
    private static void
    playSingleMonsterAttack(Monster m, Runnable applyDamageThenUpdateUi, Runnable afterDone)
    Plays a single monster attack sequence: set attack sprite, wait until hit timing, apply damage, update UI, then continue.
    private static void
    rebuildTopCornerElementIcons()
    Rebuilds element icon overlays for both heroes and monsters in the top corners.
    private static void
    refreshButtons()
    Refreshes the enabled and disabled state of action buttons based on current stage and cooldowns.
    private static void
    refreshInteractivity(BattleStage stage)
    Updates UI interactivity and triggers monster animations based on the battle stage.
    private static void
    refreshTopCornerElementIcons()
    Refreshes only the element icon images in the top corners based on current model elements.
    private static void
    refreshTurnGlow()
    Refreshes the glow highlight for the currently active hero during hero decision stages.
    private static Heroes
    safeGetActiveHero()
    Safely gets the active hero from the model using the engine index.
    private static void
    setHeroInputEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enables or disables all hero-related input controls and unit boxes.
    private static void
    setupHoverGlow(javafx.scene.layout.Region node, BooleanSupplier canHover)
    Adds hover glow behavior to a node while a condition is true.
    static void
    show(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GameEngine gameEngine)
    Initializes and displays the battle scene.
    private static void
    showAttackFor1_5s(Heroes h)
    Temporarily shows the hero attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
    private static void
    showMonsterAttackFor1s(Monster m)
    Temporarily shows the monster attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.VBox
    unitCardWithHpBar_Hero(double hp, boolean dead, Heroes heroRef)
    Builds a hero card containing an HP bar and the hero sprite image.
    private static javafx.scene.layout.VBox
    unitCardWithHpBar_Monster(String typeName, double hp, boolean dead, Element e, Monster monsterRef)
    Builds a monster card containing an HP bar and the monster sprite image.
    private static void
    updateSkillDescription()
    Updates the skill description panel based on: the currently active hero and selectedSkillType.
    private static void
    updateStageCounter(GameEngine gameEngine)
    Updates the top-center stage counter text from the game engine.
    private static void
    updateUnitsAnimated()
    Updates unit HP bars and card visuals without rebuilding cards.

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleScene

      public BattleScene()

  • Method Details

    • initHeroSkillsOnce

      private static void initHeroSkillsOnce()
      Initializes the hero skill description map if it has not been initialized yet.

      This method is idempotent and will only populate data once.

    • createImageButton

      private static javafx.scene.control.Button createImageButton(String path, double fitW, double fitH)
      Creates an image-based JavaFX button with hover and press animations.

      The button uses an ImageView as its graphic and applies: scale animation on hover, drop shadow glow effect, and press translation animation.

      The button background is fully transparent.

      Parameters:
      path - resource path of the image
      fitW - width of the image
      fitH - height of the image
      Returns:
      a styled animated button

    • buildSkillPanel

      private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane buildSkillPanel()
      Builds the bottom-left skill button panel containing: normal, skill, ultimate, and cancel buttons.
      Returns:
      skill panel node

    • buildSkillDescriptionPanel

      private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane buildSkillDescriptionPanel()
      Builds the bottom-right description panel that shows action name and description based on the currently active hero and the selected skill type.
      Returns:
      description panel node

    • updateSkillDescription

      private static void updateSkillDescription()
      Updates the skill description panel based on: the currently active hero and selectedSkillType.

      If hero data is missing from the skill info map, a fallback message is shown.

    • buildStageCounterPanel

      private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane buildStageCounterPanel(GameEngine gameEngine)
      Builds a top-center panel that displays the stage counter.
      Parameters:
      gameEngine - game engine providing the stage counter value
      Returns:
      stage counter panel node

    • updateStageCounter

      private static void updateStageCounter(GameEngine gameEngine)
      Updates the top-center stage counter text from the game engine.
      Parameters:
      gameEngine - game engine used as the data source

    • onHeroTurnStartedForHud

      private static void onHeroTurnStartedForHud(Heroes hero)
      Called when a hero turn starts to update HUD state and default description selection.
      Parameters:
      hero - active hero starting the turn

    • clearSkillButtonEffects

      private static void clearSkillButtonEffects()
      Clears glow effects from skill buttons.

    • playHitAnimation

      private static void playHitAnimation(javafx.scene.layout.Region card)
      Plays a short hit animation (shake) on a unit card.
      Parameters:
      card - unit card UI node

    • loadImageSafe

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image loadImageSafe(String path, String fallbackPath)
      Attempts to load an image from a resource path. If loading fails, the fallback path is tried.
      Parameters:
      path - primary resource path
      fallbackPath - fallback resource path used if primary fails
      Returns:
      loaded image, or null if both paths fail

    • heroIdleImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image heroIdleImg(Heroes h)
      Returns the idle sprite image for a hero.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference
      Returns:
      idle image or fallback image, or null if resources missing

    • heroAttackImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image heroAttackImg(Heroes h)
      Returns the attack sprite image for a hero.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference
      Returns:
      attack image or fallback image

    • heroShieldImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image heroShieldImg(Heroes h)
      Returns the shield sprite image for a hero.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference
      Returns:
      shield image or fallback image

    • heroDeadImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image heroDeadImg(Heroes h)
      Returns the dead sprite image for a hero.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference
      Returns:
      dead image or fallback image

    • monsterTypeName

      private static String monsterTypeName(Monster m)
      Returns the resolved monster type folder name for a monster.

      This is used to ensure the same resource folder is used consistently for idle, attack, and dead sprites.

      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      type folder name

    • monsterIdleImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image monsterIdleImg(Monster m)
      Returns the idle sprite image for a monster.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      idle image or fallback image

    • monsterDeadImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image monsterDeadImg(Monster m)
      Returns the dead sprite image for a monster.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      dead image or fallback image

    • monsterAttackImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image monsterAttackImg(Monster m)
      Returns the attack sprite image for a monster.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      attack image or fallback image

    • heroBaseImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image heroBaseImg(Heroes h)
      Returns the base hero image appropriate for current hero state: dead, shielded, or idle.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference
      Returns:
      base image or null if resources missing

    • monsterBaseImg

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image monsterBaseImg(Monster m)
      Returns the base monster image appropriate for current monster state: dead or idle.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      base image or null if resources missing

    • showAttackFor1_5s

      private static void showAttackFor1_5s(Heroes h)
      Temporarily shows the hero attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
      Parameters:
      h - hero reference

    • showMonsterAttackFor1s

      private static void showMonsterAttackFor1s(Monster m)
      Temporarily shows the monster attack sprite for about 1 second and then reverts to base image.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference

    • initTopCornerElementUI

      private static void initTopCornerElementUI(javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane root)
      Initializes the top-corner element UI panels and places them in the root anchor pane.
      Parameters:
      root - root container for the scene

    • rebuildTopCornerElementIcons

      private static void rebuildTopCornerElementIcons()
      Rebuilds element icon overlays for both heroes and monsters in the top corners.

      This clears all existing icon nodes and creates fresh overlays based on the current model.

    • buildHeroElementOverlay

      private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane buildHeroElementOverlay(Heroes hero)
      Creates a top-left overlay icon for a hero showing: element icon and hero icon.
      Parameters:
      hero - hero reference
      Returns:
      overlay node representing the hero element display

    • buildMonsterElementOverlay

      private static javafx.scene.layout.StackPane buildMonsterElementOverlay(Monster m)
      Creates a top-right overlay icon for a monster showing: element icon and monster sprite icon.
      Parameters:
      m - monster reference
      Returns:
      overlay node representing the monster element display

    • refreshTopCornerElementIcons

      private static void refreshTopCornerElementIcons()
      Refreshes only the element icon images in the top corners based on current model elements.

    • isHeroDecisionStage

      private static boolean isHeroDecisionStage(BattleStage s)
      Returns true if the stage is a hero decision stage where player input is expected.
      Parameters:
      s - stage to check
      Returns:
      true if stage is HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL, HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET, or HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY

    • safeGetActiveHero

      private static Heroes safeGetActiveHero()
      Safely gets the active hero from the model using the engine index.
      Returns:
      active hero or null if index invalid

    • handleEndTurnAttackImage

      private static void handleEndTurnAttackImage(BattleStage currentStage)
      Handles attack image transitions when a turn ends.

      This method uses stage transitions to decide when to show the previous hero's attack sprite briefly.

      Parameters:
      currentStage - the current battle stage

    • show

      public static void show(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GameEngine gameEngine)
      Initializes and displays the battle scene.

      This method creates the BattleModel and BattleEngine, constructs UI nodes, attaches event handlers, registers a BattleListener, builds unit cards, and starts the battle.

      Parameters:
      stage - the primary JavaFX stage used to render the scene
      gameEngine - the main game engine containing stage counter and team data

    • buildUnits

      private static void buildUnits()
      Builds all unit cards for heroes and monsters one time.

      This clears existing UI maps and containers before creating new card nodes. Cards also register hover and click handlers based on the active battle stage.

    • updateUnitsAnimated

      private static void updateUnitsAnimated()
      Updates unit HP bars and card visuals without rebuilding cards.

      This method:

      • Animates HP bar changes
      • Plays hit animation when damage is taken
      • Updates opacity when a unit dies
      • Resets sprite to base image if no temporary animation is active

    • unitCardWithHpBar_Hero

      private static javafx.scene.layout.VBox unitCardWithHpBar_Hero(double hp, boolean dead, Heroes heroRef)
      Builds a hero card containing an HP bar and the hero sprite image.
      Parameters:
      hp - initial hp
      dead - whether the hero is dead at creation time
      heroRef - hero reference for maps and sprite lookup
      Returns:
      hero card node

    • unitCardWithHpBar_Monster

      private static javafx.scene.layout.VBox unitCardWithHpBar_Monster(String typeName, double hp, boolean dead, Element e, Monster monsterRef)
      Builds a monster card containing an HP bar and the monster sprite image.
      Parameters:
      typeName - monster folder type name used for resource lookup
      hp - initial hp
      dead - whether the monster is dead at creation time
      e - monster element used for resource lookup
      monsterRef - monster reference for maps and sprite lookup
      Returns:
      monster card node

    • setupHoverGlow

      private static void setupHoverGlow(javafx.scene.layout.Region node, BooleanSupplier canHover)
      Adds hover glow behavior to a node while a condition is true.

      This is used to indicate selectable targets during target selection stages.

      Parameters:
      node - node to apply hover effect to
      canHover - condition that must be true to show hover glow

    • refreshButtons

      private static void refreshButtons()
      Refreshes the enabled and disabled state of action buttons based on current stage and cooldowns.

    • refreshTurnGlow

      private static void refreshTurnGlow()
      Refreshes the glow highlight for the currently active hero during hero decision stages.

    • refreshInteractivity

      private static void refreshInteractivity(BattleStage stage)
      Updates UI interactivity and triggers monster animations based on the battle stage.

      This method controls which UI inputs are enabled and starts the monster attack sequence during BattleStage.MONSTER_TURN.

      Parameters:
      stage - current battle stage

    • playSingleMonsterAttack

      private static void playSingleMonsterAttack(Monster m, Runnable applyDamageThenUpdateUi, Runnable afterDone)
      Plays a single monster attack sequence: set attack sprite, wait until hit timing, apply damage, update UI, then continue.
      Parameters:
      m - monster performing the attack
      applyDamageThenUpdateUi - callback to apply damage and update UI
      afterDone - callback to continue to the next monster

    • playAllMonstersAttack

      private static void playAllMonstersAttack(List<Monster> monsters, int idx, Runnable onAllDone, Consumer<Monster> applyDamageForMonster)
      Plays attack animations for all monsters sequentially.

      This ensures monsters attack one at a time rather than simultaneously.

      Parameters:
      monsters - list of monsters
      idx - current monster index
      onAllDone - callback when all monsters finish attacking
      applyDamageForMonster - logic to apply damage for each monster

    • setHeroInputEnabled

      private static void setHeroInputEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables all hero-related input controls and unit boxes.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable input, false to disable input

    • getGameEngine

      private static GameEngine getGameEngine()
      Returns the current game engine reference for this battle scene.
      Returns:
      game engine reference

    • getStage

      private static javafx.stage.Stage getStage()
      Returns the current stage reference for this battle scene.
      Returns:
      JavaFX stage hosting the battle scene
